creator: hoek@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This was a pr about a page fault while in kernel mode on 3.0-current. 

Many such problems have been fixed.  Moreover, if this one hadn't been 
fixed, presumably we would still be getting messages on -current from 
scrappy trying to debug it, since he's one of the more tenacious FreeBSD 
developers around.  ;-)  So I assume it has been fixed.  Sorry if I'm 
wrong, scrappy.
